label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 8

extraction.one_line_summary: JAKOBSEN won the sprint after deliberately skipping the intermediate sprint, taking the green jersey from PHILIPSEN on placings despite equal stage wins.
tactical_patterns: JAKOBSEN repeatedly skips intermediate sprints to conserve position, then wins stage finale—strategic energy management trumps point accumulation.
SÉNÉCHAL's extended lead-out caused Quick-Step's sprinter DÉMARE to lose contact, revealing fragility in overly aggressive lead-out tempo.
Team attempts crosswind split at 30km with two-lane funnel, but peloton reconfigured—infrastructure matters more than wind strength alone.

rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: positive: Won sprint and took green jersey by deliberately conserving energy at intermediate sprint, superior race-craft execution
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: neutral: Won intermediate sprint but lost stage and jersey on placings, demonstrates point-chasing creates positioning disadvantage
rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: negative: Dropped by own lead-out train under SÉNÉCHAL's pace, concerning sign of form struggles
rider_signals.DAINESE Alberto: positive: Second place shows climbing form on sprint-heavy Vuelta, emerging contender for transitional stages
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: negative: Caught out by 30km crosswind attempt, uncharacteristic positioning error for experienced rider
rider_signals.SÉNÉCHAL Florian: neutral: Executed aggressive lead-out but dropped own sprinter, tactical misjudgment of DÉMARE's current capabilities
